neighborhoods.name: El Cangrejo Centro
neighborhoods.description: Central urban neighborhood with diverse restaurants from Chinese to Lebanese, hotels, and the Einstein Head statue
neighborhoods.character: Central multicultural, diverse dining, urban convenient

housing.predominantType: Mid-rise and high-rise condos and apartments

neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of Panama City. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Panama City

neighborhoods.name: Obarrio
neighborhoods.description: Adjacent upscale financial district with banks, embassies, and luxury apartment towers

housing.predominantType: Luxury high-rise apartments and office-residential towers

neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to Panama City's center and services.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Panama City

neighborhoods.name: Betania
neighborhoods.description: Residential area south of El Cangrejo with local character and more affordable housing

housing.predominantType: Apartments and houses at moderate prices

neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Panama City

neighborhoods.name: Via Argentina / Via Espana Corridor
neighborhoods.description: Commercial corridors with international restaurants, services, and good transit connections

housing.predominantType: Apartments in towers along main avenues

neighborhoods.character_notes: Area with established international community and expat-oriented services. English is more commonly spoken here than in other neighborhoods.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Panama City
